creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
The main purpose of this script is to benchmark all available mirrors. It resolves the available hosts by:

$ host -t srv _http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org has SRV record 10 10 80 pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.bme.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.isc.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.nyi.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.pkt.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org has SRV record 50 10 80 pkg0.tuk.freebsd.org.

The suggested configuration is meant to 'hardcode' the fastest mirror. Therefore explicitly not using pkg+...
